Source   Edit  

Simultaneous Blockade Resolution

Handles simultaneous resolution of BlockadePlanet orders to prevent first-mover advantages.

Imports

simultaneous_types, simultaneous_resolver, ../gamestate, ../orders, ../order_types, ../logger, ../squadron, ../../common/types/core

Procs

proc collectBlockadeIntents(state: GameState;
                            orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket]): seq[
    BlockadeIntent] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Collect all blockade attempts Source   Edit   
proc detectBlockadeConflicts(intents: seq[BlockadeIntent]): seq[BlockadeConflict] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Group blockade intents by target colony Source   Edit   
proc resolveBlockadeConflict(state: var GameState; conflict: BlockadeConflict;
                             rng: var Rand): seq[BlockadeResult] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Resolve blockade conflict - strongest blockader wins (like colonization) Source   Edit   
proc resolveBlockades(state: var GameState; orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket];
                      rng: var Rand): seq[BlockadeResult] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, ValueError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Main entry point: Resolve all blockade orders simultaneously Source   Edit

                        fleetId: FleetId): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
